Translation.Video Subject: Video Subject (Given a keyword, :red[AI auto-generates] video script)
Translation.Script Language: Language of the generated video script (Usually, AI automatically outputs according to the language of the input subject)
Translation.Generate Video Script and Keywords: Click to use AI to generate **Video Script** and **Video Keywords** based on the **subject**
Translation.Video script table help: Edit the full script JSON as a table. You can add or delete rows; saving will validate and write the script file again.
Translation.Plot Description: Plot Description (:blue[Can be obtained from https://www.tvmao.com/])
Translation.Generate Video Keywords: Click to use AI to generate **Video Keywords** based on the **script**
Translation.Please Enter the Video Subject: Please enter the video script first
Translation.Generating Video Script and Keywords: AI is generating the video script and keywords...
Translation.Generating Video Keywords: AI is generating the video keywords...
Translation.Video Keywords: Video Keywords (:blue[Long videos work better in conjunction with plot descriptions.])
Translation.Clip Duration: Maximum Clip Duration (Seconds) (**Not the total length of the video**, refers to the length of each **composite segment**)
Translation.Speech Synthesis: Speech Synthesis Voice (:red[**Keep consistent with the script language**. Note: V2 version performs better, but requires an API KEY; SoulVoice provides high-quality Chinese voices])
Translation.Speech Key: API Key (:red[Required, either Key 1 or Key 2 is acceptable [Click to Get](https://portal.azure.com/#view/Microsoft_Azure_ProjectOxford/CognitiveServicesHub/~/SpeechServices)])
Translation.Custom Background Music File: Please enter the file path of the custom background music
Translation.Background Music Source Help: Choose background music from the resource directory, upload a new file, or disable background music.
Translation.Background Music Path Help: Choose the background music used for video synthesis.
Translation.No Background Music Resources Found: No background music resources found. Please upload a background music file.
Translation.Upload Background Music Help: Upload an audio file to use as background music.
Translation.Background Music Volume: Background Music Volume (0.2 represents 20%, background sound should not be too loud)
Translation.Enable Subtitles: Enable Subtitles (If unchecked, the following settings will not take effect)
Translation.Enable Subtitle Mask Help: Before burning in new subtitles, cover the original subtitle area with a soft blurred mask.
Translation.Subtitle Mask Settings Caption: Save landscape and portrait mask regions as frame percentages. The mask is applied before new subtitles are burned in.
Translation.Subtitle Mask Left Help: Mask distance from the left edge as a frame percentage.
Translation.Subtitle Mask Top Help: Mask distance from the top edge as a frame percentage.
Translation.Subtitle Mask Width Help: Width of the covered mask region as a frame percentage.
Translation.Subtitle Mask Height Help: Height of the covered mask region as a frame percentage.
Translation.Subtitle Mask Blur Radius Help: Blur strength for the mask background and edge.
Translation.Subtitle Mask Opacity Help: Mask blend strength. Higher values cover source subtitles more strongly.
Translation.Subtitle Mask Preview Caption: Upload a source video for preview, or use the currently selected source video. Uploaded files here are only used for mask preview.
Translation.Upload Subtitle Mask Preview Video Help: Only used for previewing the mask in this dialog. It will not replace the source video used for generation.
Translation.Subtitle Mask Preview Empty: Upload a preview video, or select a source video above first.
Translation.Subtitle Mask Preview Timeline Help: Drag to a frame where the source subtitles appear, then fine-tune the mask region.
Translation.Subtitle Mask Preview Frame Caption: {time} · {orientation} · red outline shows the current mask region
Translation.Subtitle Mask Preview Failed: Unable to read this video preview. Please try another video file.
Translation.Enable Auto Transcription Help: After the final video is merged, transcribe the whole video into subtitles and burn them into the output.
Translation.Custom: Custom Position (70, represents 70% from the top)
Translation.Video Script and Subject Cannot Both Be: Video Subject and Video Script cannot both be empty
Translation.You can download the generated video fro: You can download the generated video from the following links
Translation.Pixabay API Key: Pixabay API Key ([Click to Get](https://pixabay.com/api/docs/#api_search_videos)) :red[Optional, if Pexels is unavailable, then choose Pixabay]
Translation.API Key: API Key (:red[Required, must be applied from the LLM provider's backend])
Translation.Account ID: Account ID (Obtained from the URL of the Cloudflare dashboard)
Translation.Model Name: Model Name (:blue[Confirm the authorized model name from the LLM provider's backend])
Translation.Get Help:
One-stop AI video commentary + automated editing tool🎉🎉🎉

For any questions or suggestions, you can join the **community channel** for help or discussion: https://github.com/linyqh/NarratoAI/wiki
Translation.Voice Example: This is a sample text for testing voice synthesis
Translation.Select a video from resource videos dire: Select a video from the ./resource/videos directory
Translation.Upload a new video file up to 2GB: Upload a new video file, up to 2GB
Translation.Upload new video files up to 2GB each: Upload one or more video files, up to 2GB each
Translation.No video files found in resource videos: No video files found in the ./resource/videos directory
Translation.Custom prompt for LLM, leave empty to us: Custom prompt for LLM. Leave empty to use the default prompt.
Translation.Max Output Tokens Help: Maximum generated output length. 0 uses the provider default.
Translation.Thinking Level Help: Controls reasoning effort. Auto sends no extra thinking parameter; low/medium/high tries reasoning_effort.
Translation.0: Keep the audio only, 1: Keep the orig: 0: Keep the narration only, 1: Keep the original sound only, 2: Keep both original sound and narration
Translation.QwenVL model returned invalid response: QwenVL model returned an invalid response
Translation.API rate limit exceeded. Please wait abo: API rate limit exceeded. Please wait about an hour and try again.
Translation.Resources exhausted. Please try again la: Resources exhausted. Please try again later.
Translation.Adjust the volume of the original audio: Adjust the volume of the original audio
Translation.Frame Interval (seconds) (More keyframes: Frame Interval (seconds) (More keyframes consume more tokens)
Translation.Batch Size (More keyframes consume more: Batch Size (smaller batches consume more tokens)
Translation.设置需要生成的短视频片段数量: Set the number of short video clips to generate
Translation.无法读取字幕文件，请检查文件编码（支持 UTF-8、UTF-16、GBK、GB2: Unable to read the subtitle file. Please check the file encoding. Supported encodings: UTF-8, UTF-16, GBK, GB2312.
Translation.字幕文件内容似乎为空，请检查文件: The subtitle file appears to be empty. Please check the file.
Translation.TTS engine does not support precise subt: ⚠️ {engine} does not support precise subtitle generation
Translation.Manual subtitle editing recommendation: 💡 We recommend adding subtitles manually in a professional editor such as CapCut or Premiere Pro.
Translation.Disabled subtitles help: This TTS engine does not support subtitle generation. Please use another TTS engine.
Translation.Edge TTS features: Completely free, but service stability can vary and voice cloning is not supported.
Translation.Azure Speech Services features: Includes a free quota, then pay-as-you-go billing. An overseas credit card may be required.
Translation.Azure Speech Services use case: Enterprise use cases that need a stable service
Translation.Tencent Cloud TTS features: Includes a free quota, good voice quality, multiple voices, and fast access in mainland China.
Translation.Tencent Cloud TTS use case: Personal and enterprise users who need stable Chinese speech synthesis
Translation.Tongyi Qwen3 TTS features: Alibaba Cloud Tongyi Qwen speech synthesis with high-quality voices and multiple voice options.
Translation.High-quality Chinese speech synthesis us: Users who need high-quality Chinese speech synthesis
Translation.IndexTTS2 features: A locally or privately deployed voice-cloning engine. Choose a resource audio file or upload a reference audio file, then synthesize narration in that voice.
Translation.IndexTTS2 use case: Best for fixed narrator voices, character dubbing, or generating multiple videos with the same voice. Start the IndexTTS2 API service before use. Deployment package: https://pan.quark.cn/s/0767c9bcefd5
Translation.Doubao TTS features: Volcengine Doubao speech synthesis with multiple voices and emotions, plus fast access in mainland China.
Translation.Select TTS Engine Help: Choose the text-to-speech engine you want to use.
Translation.Azure Service Region Help: Azure Speech Services region, such as eastus, westus2, or eastasia.
Translation.Azure Voice Name Help: Enter an Azure Speech Services voice name. You can use the official voice name directly, such as zh-CN-YunzeNeural.
Translation.Azure Voices Docs Notice: 💡 For more voices, see the [Azure Speech Services documentation](https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/cognitive-services/speech-service/language-support).
Translation.Voice name format may be invalid: ⚠️ Voice name format may be incorrect: {voice}
Translation.Azure voice name format notice: 💡 Azure voice names usually follow this format: [language]-[region]-[name]Neural
Translation.Please configure Jianying draft folder i: Please configure the Jianying draft folder in Basic Settings
Translation.Jianying draft folder does not exist: Jianying draft folder does not exist: {path}
Translation.Please enter Jianying draft name: Please enter the Jianying draft name

⚠️ LLM initialization failed: {error}

Please check whether the configuration file and dependencies are installed correctly.
Translation.Jianying Draft Folder Path Help: Jianying draft folder path, for example: C:\Users\Username\Documents\JianyingPro Drafts
Translation.Custom API endpoint help: OpenAI-compatible endpoint URL. Use a full /v1 URL for third-party or self-hosted gateways; leave empty for the official OpenAI API.
Translation.OpenAI compatible gateway help: {model_type} uses an OpenAI-compatible API, so a complete endpoint URL is required.
Translation.Model Name Input Help:
Enter the full model name.

Common examples:
Translation.OpenAI compatible providers help: The vendor is not limited here; OpenAI, DeepSeek, OpenRouter, SiliconFlow, or a self-hosted gateway all work as long as the endpoint is OpenAI-compatible.
Translation.OpenAI compatible protocol help: This does not require the official OpenAI model; any service that supports the OpenAI Chat Completions compatible API can be used.
Translation.Provider API Key Help:
API key for the model service.

Common places to get one:
Translation.Please fill OpenAI compatible gateway: Please fill in the OpenAI-compatible gateway URL above, for example: {example}
Translation.Please enter API key: Please enter the API key first
Translation.Please enter model name: Please enter the model name first
Translation.Connection test error: An error occurred while testing the connection
Translation.Text model config saved: Text generation model configuration saved (OpenAI compatible)
Translation.Please enter a value between 0 and 100: Please enter a value between 0 and 100
Translation.Local Fun-ASR upload caption: The current video above will be converted to SRT subtitles through the locally running FunASR-Pack API.
Translation.Fun-ASR upload caption: The current video above will be uploaded to temporary Ali Bailian storage and converted to SRT subtitles with fun-asr.
Translation.Auto Transcription Local Caption: After the final video is merged, it will be converted to SRT subtitles through the locally running FunASR-Pack API.
Translation.Auto Transcription Online Caption: After the final video is merged, it will be uploaded to temporary Ali Bailian storage and converted to SRT subtitles with fun-asr.
Translation.Local FunASR-Pack API URL Help: For example, http://127.0.0.1:7860. A full /asr endpoint URL is also supported.
Translation.Fun-ASR Hotword Help: Optional hotwords passed to the local FunASR-Pack API.
Translation.Enable speaker diarization Help: Requires the local FunASR-Pack service to enable and load the spk model.
Translation.Ali Bailian API Key Help: Enter your Ali Bailian API Key. After saving, it will be written to the local config.toml file.

Translation.Using selected videos for subtitle trans: Using {count} current videos for subtitle transcription: {files}

Translation.Tencent Secret ID Help: Enter your Tencent Cloud Secret ID
Translation.Tencent Secret Key Help: Enter your Tencent Cloud Secret Key
Translation.Tencent Service Region Help: Select the Tencent Cloud TTS service region
Translation.Select Tencent TTS Voice: Select a Tencent Cloud TTS voice
Translation.Tencent More Voices Notice: 💡 See the official Tencent Cloud documentation for more voices.
Translation.Qwen TTS Model Help: Qwen TTS model name, for example qwen3-tts-flash
Translation.Reference Audio Source Help: Choose a reference audio from the resource directory or upload a new one.
Translation.Reference Audio Path Help: Choose the reference audio for voice cloning (WAV/MP3, 3-10 seconds recommended)
Translation.No Reference Audio Resources Found: No reference audio resources found. Please upload a reference audio file.
Translation.Upload Reference Audio Help: Upload a clear audio clip for voice cloning
Translation.Inference Mode Help: Standard inference has higher quality but is slower. Fast inference is faster with slightly lower quality.
Translation.Sampling Temperature Help: Controls randomness. Higher values are more random; lower values are more deterministic.
Translation.Top P Help: Probability threshold for nucleus sampling. Smaller values make results more deterministic.
Translation.Top K Help: The k value for top-k sampling. 0 disables top-k.
Translation.Num Beams Help: Number of beams for beam search. Higher values may improve quality but slow generation.
Translation.Repetition Penalty Help: Higher values reduce repetition, but overly high values may sound unnatural.
Translation.Enable Sampling Help: Enable sampling for more natural speech.
Translation.IndexTTS2 Usage Instructions:
**Zero-shot voice cloning**

1. **Prepare reference audio**: upload or specify a clear audio file (3-10 seconds recommended)
2. **Set API URL**: make sure the IndexTTS2 service is running
3. **Start synthesis**: the system will use the reference voice to synthesize new speech

**Notes**:
- Reference audio quality directly affects synthesis quality
- Use clean audio without background noise when possible
- Keep text length within a reasonable range
- The first synthesis may take longer
Translation.Doubao Cluster Help: Business cluster. Standard voices use volcano_tts.
Translation.Doubao TTS API Key Application Process: 💡 Doubao TTS API Key Application Process
Translation.Doubao TTS Step 2: 2. Create a new Access Key and Secret Key
Translation.Doubao TTS Step 5: 5. In the left API Service Center, find Speech Synthesis under Audio Generation (note: Speech Synthesis, not the speech synthesis large model)
Translation.Doubao TTS Step 6: 6. Scroll to the bottom to get the APPID and Access Token
Translation.Doubao TTS Fill Credentials Notice: 💡 Fill the Access Key, Secret Key, AppID, and Token above.
